title: May 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 14''' is the 134th day of the year (135th in leap years). There are 231 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s|1933]] – [[Siân Phillips]] is born.
*[[1940s|1944]] – [[George Lucas]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Sofia Coppola]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 98|''Star Wars'' (1977) 98]] published.
*[[1988]] – [[Charlie Bowater]] is born.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' released.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi: Shaak Ti]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 19]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 28|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 28]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 1: Shades of the Sith]]'' finishes publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars Storyboards: The Prequel Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 17|''Star Wars'' (2013) 17]] published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Replacements]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2023]] – [[Mark Boudreaux]] dies.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 3|''Jedi Knights'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
